name: Eijiro Kirishima and Tetsutetsu Tetsutetsu
description:
Credit to - @Akitonanuma Kirishima and Tetsutetsu bot, and I kinda wanted to edit it a little (a lot). Plus I just thought it was so freaking cute!!

I hope you like it! ♡ By the way, don't judge how I type, I'm just built different. 💪🦵

I might make more KiriTetsu bots, with different scenarios. ( ͡°3 ͡°)
